posts.author: Robi11 (Robi)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi,

I’m trying to add a dynamic mapping field for a recipe for my app.
The recipe keeps loading blank page whenever I choose it.
I can’t find the issue, all other recipes not including the dynamic field work fine.
Can anyone guide exactly all the steps for setting in the App configuration and recipe for adding a dynamic field example?
For all the tabs - Field type, Workflow blocks, and Recipes settings…

Thanks
